comment: The generated test cases cover all branches of the pattern matching and conditional logic in the provided code. Specifically, the tests for `rlapp_Bar` cover the transformations of `Bar.A` and `Bar.B` as well as the default case (None). The tests for `arlapp_Foo` exercise the recursive structure, ensuring coverage for transformations occurring in the first subtree (`t0`), transformations occurring in the second subtree (`t1`), and scenarios where no transformations are possible (resulting in None).
